title: koyamacalia roborowskii
intro: Koyamacalia roborowskii, also known as the Sichuan crowndaisy or Koyama's crowndaisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the Sichuan province of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Koyamacalia roborowskii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil for topical application, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
